title: Fedora image 38 wants to install rawhide 39 packages
body:
### Issue Description

When attempting to build a custom toolbox for Fedora 38 as per the output below, the source image is show to be fedora 38 from the fedora registry, but already at step 8 the process is using rawhide repos and will begin updating packages to 39.


````
[bkelly@xps f38]$ podman build -t tools-38 .
STEP 1/20: FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:38
STEP 2/20: ARG NAME=fedora-toolbox
--> Using cache 41af2b5c3671713e92d457714dfe80ce868df693c82f313a4566f4041ab52e28
--> 41af2b5c367
STEP 3/20: ARG VERSION=38
--> Using cache 8142ed90894d7673570f5c930a9e81c5e3faa34f28a31c3a28692653c9099a8c
--> 8142ed90894
STEP 4/20: LABEL com.github.containers.toolbox="true"       com.redhat.component="$NAME"       name="$NAME"       version="$VERSION"       usage="This image is meant to be used with the toolbox command"       summary="Base image for creating Fedora toolbox containers"       maintainer="Debarshi Ray <rishi@fedoraproject.org>"
--> Using cache d6be8c8566e3d5c965574d238f960cd9aef5fe20bf4f711c9c96239574890a3d
--> d6be8c8566e
STEP 5/20: COPY README.md /
--> Using cache 4f7920463eac1919c1eeee4cefeac60564efd76b4580d40b197b08cdae701c6b
--> 4f7920463ea
STEP 6/20: RUN rm /etc/rpm/macros.image-language-conf
--> Using cache 1edea9f13d544da613e32a70f328d5a5663fb3b6d89d1bd4f96a426508750ac3
--> 1edea9f13d5
STEP 7/20: RUN sed -i '/tsflags=nodocs/d' /etc/dnf/dnf.conf
--> Using cache 276095537f859743a965346fbc889bfd9e056e41f87041eab19974f4c5fc6e81
--> 276095537f8
STEP 8/20: RUN dnf -y upgrade
Fedora rawhide openh264 (From Cisco) - x86_64   799  B/s | 2.5 kB     00:03    
Fedora - Rawhide - Developmental packages for t 840 kB/s |  66 MB     01:20   
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1.  Clone this containers/toolbox repo
2.  Cd into toolbox/images/fedora/f38
3. run podman build -t tools-38 .



### Describe the results you received

Describe the results you received

Starts upgrading from rawhide repos

### Describe the results you expected

Starts upgrading from Fedora 38 repos

### podman info output

```yaml
If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running.
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
Podman is not responsible for the container image content. Have you tried re-pulling the image `podman pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:38`, podman will use the local version if it is already present and does not pull the latest by default. 
Also it works for me
```
$ podman run registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:38 dnf up
Fedora 38 - x86_64                              5.9 MB/s |  83 MB     00:14    
 Fedora 38 openh264 (From Cisco) - x86_64        1.2 kB/s | 2.5 kB     00:02    
Fedora Modular 38 - x86_64                      1.5 MB/s | 2.8 MB     00:01    
Fedora 38 - x86_64 - Updates                    270  B/s | 257  B     00:00    
Fedora Modular 38 - x86_64 - Updates            174  B/s | 257  B     00:01    
Fedora 38 - x86_64 - Test Updates               3.0 MB/s | 6.2 MB     00:02    
Fedora Modular 38 - x86_64 - Test Updates       227  B/s | 257  B     00:01    
Dependencies resolved.
================================================================================
 Package           Arch        Version               Repository            Size
================================================================================
Upgrading:
 alternatives      x86_64      1.22-1.fc38           updates-testing       38 k
 curl              x86_64      7.87.0-7.fc38         updates-testing      347 k
 libcurl           x86_64      7.87.0-7.fc38         updates-testing      304 k
 libsemanage       x86_64      3.5-2.fc38            updates-testing      120 k
 tzdata            noarch      2023b-1.fc38          updates-testing      718 k

Transaction Summary
================================================================================
Upgrade  5 Packages

Total download size: 1.5 M
Is this ok [y/N]: Operation aborted.
```
